top_signals.title: UK Petrol Prices Hit Highest Level Since 2022
top_signals.summary: Petrol prices in the UK have hit a new high since the Iran war began, as the price of oil jumped back up to $100 per barrel following fresh US strikes. The average price of a litre of petrol is now 159.43p in the UK, according to motoring services firm the RAC. This petrol price is the highest since December 2022, and 26.6p more expensive than on February 28, the day the US and Israel first launched strikes on Iran. Diesel prices, however, remain below their mid-April peak at 184.96p per litre, 6.58p lower than on April 15.  Chancellor extends…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cathay Pacific, Air China Cargo top up orders for Airbus A350 freighter
top_signals.summary:
Air China Cargo has exercised options for four additional Airbus A350 cargo jets. Airbus now has almost double the amount of orders for large, next-gen freighters as Boeing.

The post Cathay Pacific, Air China Cargo top up orders for Airbus A350 freighter appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: How did Jay Powell do at the Fed?
top_signals.summary: The outgoing chair has made some mistakes, but his decision to stand up to Trump was heroic
